title: 04_principles
description: Output of lookup_principles.py: the principles found in the matrix cell (or the empty result that triggers the no-clean-mapping branch). alternatives_tried is recorded for replay reproducibility.

populated.description: False when the cell (and all alternatives) are empty; triggers the no-clean-mapping branch.

principles.description: Principle ids returned by the matrix cell. Empty when populated == false. Integer ids per the host matrix's principle table; canonical_id resolution happens at interpretation time.

alternatives_tried.description: Each (improving, worsening) pair attempted, in order. The first hit determines the populated principles; remaining entries are recorded for replay.
